label: PI-073 close-out — eight-phase Session/Conversation entity redesign per DEC-314 lands on main. Captures all eight phase commits (Phase A migration through Phase F data migration), the audit + documentation conversation that produced this payload, and resolves PI-073. The session and conversation entities surrender their legacy v0.7 shapes: session is now the medium-agnostic communication container with a six-status lifecycle (DEC-013 fully superseded — sessions are schedulable and stateful), conversation is now the topical sub-unit within a session in a 1:N relationship (DEC-119's 1:0..1 model retired). Existing CONV-NNN identifiers are now session identifiers; existing SES-NNN identifiers are now conversation identifiers; new conversations use CNV-NNN going forward. This payload is authored against the new schema and applies AFTER the rebase + merge + Phase F data migration land on main per the apply prompt at prompts/CLAUDE-CODE-PROMPT-apply-close-out-ses-099.md.

session.session_title: PI-073 close-out — Session/Conversation entity redesign complete (DEC-314 implementation)
session.session_description: Phase G of the PI-073 redesign workstream. Audit + documentation propagation conversation conducted in Claude Code on the pi-073-redesign branch. Verifies the eight-phase build (A through F) committed cleanly, propagates the new model through CLAUDE.md, authors the close-out payload + apply prompt, and resolves PI-073. The session represents the Claude Code conversation that produced this close-out; under the new schema it is a medium=chat session with medium_metadata.chat_platform=claude_code.

conversation.conversation_title: PI-073 close-out — audit and documentation propagation
conversation.conversation_purpose: Verify the eight-phase build, propagate the new model through CLAUDE.md, author the close-out artifacts, and resolve PI-073.
conversation.conversation_description: First conversation under the new CNV-NNN identifier prefix (post-Phase-F migration; existing SES-NNN identifiers now identify the migrated topical sub-units of legacy sessions, so newly created conversations use the fresh CNV-NNN sequence per the identifier-prefix asymmetry recorded in DEC-314). The conversation reviews the branch's eight phase commits, runs an end-to-end API smoke-test on the migrated data (66 sessions, 95 conversations, 1649 refs retargeted), drafts the CLAUDE.md addendum at the v2 governance recording rules section pointing readers at session-v2.md and conversation-v2.md, and produces this close-out payload plus the corresponding apply prompt. Resolves PI-073.
conversation.conversation_summary: PI-073 ships. Eight commits (init + A + B.1 + B.2 + C + D + E + F) on the pi-073-redesign branch carry the redesign end-to-end: schema migration with legacy-table preservation, vocabulary updates, ORM models, repositories, REST endpoints, schemas, apply_close_out.py update, MCP tools, desktop UI rewrite, and the data migration that translates 66 conversations + 95 sessions into the new shape with full reference-edge retargeting. PI-073 is resolved by this close-out's resolves_planning_items section. The Phase G conversation does not produce additional decisions or planning items; DEC-314 (active since SES-095) is the architectural authority and remains so.

commits.commit_message_first_line: v2: PI-073 branch initialized — v0.3 plan (branch + DB isolation)
commits.commit_message_full:
v2: PI-073 branch initialized — v0.3 plan (branch + DB isolation)

Initializes the pi-073-redesign branch for the Session/Conversation entity redesign per PI-073 + DEC-314. v0.3 plan documents the branch + DB-isolation strategy that quarantines mid-flight breakage from main. Backups at ~/v2-backups/{CRMBUILDER,CBM}.db.pre-pi-073.20260527-100817.

commits.commit_message_first_line: v2: PI-073 Phase A — Alembic migration redesigning session and conversation tables
commits.commit_message_full:
v2: PI-073 Phase A — Alembic migration redesigning session and conversation tables

Migration 0020 (pre-rebase number; renumbered to 0021 at rebase to revise 0020_pi_074_executive_summary). Renames old conversations → legacy_conversations and old sessions → legacy_sessions, creates new sessions table (medium-agnostic) and new conversations table (topical sub-unit, CNV-NNN identifier), extends refs.relationship_kind CHECK with six new kinds, renames commits.commit_conversation_id → commit_session_id. CHECK constraints on identifier format admit both legacy and new prefixes per the migration plan.

commits.commit_message_first_line: v2: PI-073 Phase B.1 — vocab + ORM models updated to new session/conversation schema
commits.commit_message_full:
v2: PI-073 Phase B.1 — vocab + ORM models updated to new session/conversation schema

Replaces SESSION_STATUSES and CONVERSATION_STATUSES with the new six-status sets; adds SESSION_MEDIUMS; adds six new relationship kinds (session_belongs_to_workstream, session_opens_against_work_ticket, session_follows_from, conversation_belongs_to_session, conversation_follows_from, conversation_relates_to) and matching _kinds_for_pair clauses. Rewrites the Session and Conversation ORM model classes to match the new schema.

commits.commit_message_first_line: v2: PI-073 Phase B.2 — sessions and conversations repositories rewritten for new schema
commits.commit_message_full:
v2: PI-073 Phase B.2 — sessions and conversations repositories rewritten for new schema

Rewrites sessions.py (full lifecycle CRUD; session_belongs_to_workstream edge required; complete-requires-conversation edge rule) and conversations.py (CNV-NNN prefix; conversation_belongs_to_session edge required; cross-session continuity via conversation_follows_from / conversation_relates_to). Legacy shims preserved for callers not yet ported.

commits.commit_message_first_line: v2: PI-073 Phase C — REST routers, schemas, apply_close_out.py updated for new shape
commits.commit_message_full:
v2: PI-073 Phase C — REST routers, schemas, apply_close_out.py updated for new shape

Rewrites the /sessions and /conversations routers to full nine-endpoint CRUD; updates Pydantic schemas for the new field set including session_medium_metadata JSON column and conversation_summary; renames commit_conversation_id → commit_session_id throughout commits router + repository + schemas; updates apply_close_out.py to derive commit_session_id from the payload's session block instead of conversation_identifier from the conversation block. End-to-end API smoke-test verified against branch DB.

commits.commit_message_first_line: v2: PI-073 Phase D — MCP tools updated for new session/conversation shape
commits.commit_message_full:
v2: PI-073 Phase D — MCP tools updated for new session/conversation shape

Updates the MCP tool surface for sessions (create_session uses new field set including required medium; new update_session tool; list_sessions gains status/medium/workstream_identifier filters; list_conversations_for_session added) and adds the previously-absent conversation tools (get/list/create/update/delete_conversation, with CNV-NNN identifier auto-assignment).

commits.commit_message_first_line: v2: PI-073 Phase E — Desktop UI updated for new session/conversation shape
commits.commit_message_full:
v2: PI-073 Phase E — Desktop UI updated for new session/conversation shape

Full desktop UI rewrite for the new model. Sessions panel gains full lifecycle CRUD (edit / delete / restore / show-deleted), six-status combo with transition-aware choices, lifecycle timestamps section, JSON medium_metadata + participants collapsible sections. Session dialog set (Create / Edit / Delete) modeled on v0.7 conversation_crud pattern with workstream-membership selector authoring session_belongs_to_workstream edge inline. Conversation dialog gains session-membership selector replacing the legacy workstream selector; conversation_summary field added to schema. client.py adds list_sessions filters, next_session_identifier, patch_session, delete_session, restore_session; list_conversations filter changes workstream_identifier → session_identifier.

commits.commit_message_first_line: v2: PI-073 Phase F — Data migration of 66 conversations + 95 sessions to new shape
commits.commit_message_full:
v2: PI-073 Phase F — Data migration of 66 conversations + 95 sessions to new shape

Amends migration 0020 CHECK constraints to admit identifier-prefix asymmetry (legacy CONV-NNN rows retain identifiers as sessions; legacy SES-NNN rows retain identifiers as conversations). Introduces scripts/migrate_pi_073_data.py — the data-only migration that translates legacy_conversations → new sessions and legacy_sessions → new conversations, with reference-edge retargeting (source/target type flips, kind renames, conversation_records_session direction reversal into conversation_belongs_to_session). Audit report at PRDs/product/crmbuilder-v2/pi-073-migration-audit.md. End-to-end API smoke-test post-migration: GET /sessions count=66, GET /conversations count=95, derived endpoints intact, edge rules firing.
